name: Eamon
speech_patterns: Uses nature metaphors to describe tactics and situations
Speaks calmly even in crisis, providing steady guidance
quirks: Acts as the stable anchor when party chaos erupts
Gives advice in the form of nature parables
Never panics but acknowledges when situations are bad
example_phrases: The oak stands through the storm. So do we. Hold.
Seen this pull go wrong a dozen times. Here's how we survive it.
Roots grow deep, not fast. We take this steady.
Bad pull. Acknowledged. Now we adapt, like water round stone.
Twenty years in this game. The trick isn't never falling. It's always getting back up.
